aeo_readiness.summary: The business has some foundational elements for AEO readiness but lacks critical optimizations for better search visibility and user engagement.
quick_wins: Optimize the website title and include relevant keywords.
Encourage and manage Google reviews to build credibility and improve local search presence.
Enhance the homepage content with more detailed service descriptions and targeted keywords.

gbp_analysis.found: The business has a physical location in Portland, Oregon, and contact information is present but not prominently displayed.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has a local presence, but Google Business Profile (GBP) optimization is lacking, including the absence of reviews and likely incomplete profile information.
critical_issues: No active GBP listing found based on the provided information.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement on Google.
Insufficient local keyword targeting in website content.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) information on its website, but there is no evidence of widespread citations across directories.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.
Submit the business to local Portland business directories and industry-specific citation sites.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data for services and reviews limits search engine understanding and rich results potential.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for emergency restoration services in Portland due to low local SEO and review signals.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement LocalBusiness schema and Service schema to enhance search engine visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Develop content that highlights expertise in water and fire damage restoration, including blog posts, case studies, and customer testimonials.
